description: Composition:Red round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton with graphic chest printCare:1. Machine wash separately in cold water 2. Use mild detergent 3. Do not bleach 4. Avoid soaking 5. Remove promptly 6. Line dry inside-out in shaded 7. Warm iron only 8. Do not iron directly on print/embroideryFitting:Slim FitDo the cells in your body resemble mini motorcycles? Then maybe riding is in your blood.  Wear this smoking red tee from guerrilla while hanging out with friends or while taking your bike out for a spin. Team it with jeans or leatrher pants and biker boots to get into the vibe.Model's statistics:1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-5'11 ft, Shoulders-18"
